recommendedActions: Conduct site inspection to assess structural depth and perimeter of the pothole on 17th Cross
Perform cold-mix or hot-mix asphalt patching based on current road material specification
Level and compact the patch to match existing road grade to prevent water accumulation
Monitor site post-repair to ensure adhesion and resistance to traffic wear
dependencies: BWSSB: Verify if pothole was caused by underground utility leak or trench subsidence
Traffic Police: Coordinate temporary traffic diversion during the patching process
